mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pens ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM pens WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY pen_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pens (pen_code, pen_name, capacity, responsible_person, status) VALUES (#{penCode}, #{penName}, #{capacity}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE pens SET current_count = current_count + 1 WHERE id = #{penId}
UPDATE pens SET current_count = GREATEST(current_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{penId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pens
(pen_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR pen_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR responsible_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
